creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Sep 04, 2013 at 05:58:27PM +0200, Guido Falsi wrote:
> For the record, this is the last update to the patch. I have integrated 
> a suggestion by bapt and bsam, fixed a bunch of ports which were broken 
> and finalized the UPDATING and CHANGES messages.
> 
> -- 
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>


Approved!

thank you very much for your work!

regards,
Bapt
